summary: WorldObjectSystem.js extraction verification - 47/47 backend tests passed (100%), frontend game world loads correctly. All extracted functions (normalizeObjectForSave, normalizeEnemyForSave, extractTerrainData, disposeMeshTree, processLoadedWorldObject, createQuestMarker, resolveFullType, SELECTABLE_TYPES) working as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: WorldObjectSystem.js (206 lines) successfully extracted - pure functions with no React state or scene manipulation
GameWorld.jsx line 47-55: imports from WorldObjectSystem verified - SELECTABLE_TYPES, normalizeObjectForSave, normalizeEnemyForSave, extractTerrainData, disposeMeshTree, processLoadedWorldObject

success_rate.frontend: 100% (game world loads, world objects render via WorldObjectSystem functions)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with pattern: test_{uuid}@example.com / testpass123
context_for_next_testing_agent: WorldObjectSystem.js extraction verified working. Key patterns: (1) normalizeObjectForSave(obj, zone) returns normalized object with ALL fields for saving. (2) normalizeEnemyForSave(enemy) returns normalized enemy data. (3) extractTerrainData(geometry) extracts heightmap and colors. (4) disposeMeshTree(obj) cleans up Three.js memory. (5) processLoadedWorldObject(obj, createFn) processes loaded objects - applies rotation (degrees to radians), adds quest markers. (6) SELECTABLE_TYPES constant for click targeting. Previous fixes still working: rotation persistence (135 degrees verified), quest NPC filtering, EnemyAISystem + CombatSystem + WorldAssetFactory extractions. 47 total objects loading from /api/world/objects, 3 enemies from /api/world/enemies.

worldobjectsystem_extraction: normalizeObjectForSave preserves ALL fields: id, type, subType, fullType, position, name, level, scale, rotation, color, category, zone, quest_id, quest_giver, global_quest_id, isVendor, hasQuest
normalizeEnemyForSave preserves: id, enemyType, name, level, x/y/z, maxHealth, currentHealth, damage, color, patrolRadius, respawnTime, tier, xpReward, goldDrop
extractTerrainData returns: terrain_id, world_size, segments, seed, heightmap, colors, version
disposeMeshTree properly traverses and disposes geometry+materials
processLoadedWorldObject: resolves fullType, creates mesh, applies editorId, applies rotation (degrees->radians), adds quest markers
createQuestMarker creates yellow cone mesh for NPCs with quests
